input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.3.3
            TITLE: submit the design briefing as given in section dr - document requirements

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.3.3: Submit the Design Briefing as given in section DR - Document Requirements
S.4.3.3 Submit the Design Briefing as given in section DR - Document Requirements

final_answer: rule S.4.3.3: Submit the Design Briefing as given in section DR - Document Requirements
